name: body_exposure_standalone
description: Single tag-toggle node — verifies the node loads, accepts BOOLEAN inputs, and its bundle flattens to the expected text once routed through TagsMerge. Terminated by PreviewAny so the merged STRING surfaces in /history.
expect: nude

name: exposure_through_tags_merge
description: Wires a tag bundle into TagsMerge — verifies the CUUN_TAGS socket type and merge resolution work end-to-end. PreviewAny renders the merged prompt STRING.
expect: nude

name: meta_pony
description: Pony-specific preset — verifies BOOLEAN score / rating / source toggles compose into a CUUN_TAGS bundle that flattens (via TagsMerge) to the expected text.
expect: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up, rating_safe, source_anime, 1girl

name: three_presets_through_merge
description: Mirrors the text portion of example_workflows/character_pipeline.json — three preset bundles fanning into TagsMerge, rendered by PreviewAny.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors, smile, grin, happy, sparkling_eyes, open_mouth, :d, blush_stickers, shrine, outdoors, afternoon, miko, hakama, looking_at_viewer, smile

name: character_preset
description: Preset combo selector — verifies COMBO with a non-trivial value list resolves to expected tags (flattened via TagsMerge).
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors

name: tag_decorate_color
description: TagsDecorate prefixes a clothing.bottoms tag from a CharacterPreset bundle with colors emitted by ColorPalette. Verifies the tag-category registry resolves preset-emitted tags and the decoration phrase is correctly composed. The decorated bundle is flattened via TagsMerge and shown by PreviewAny.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, red green pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: tag_decorate_auto_broadcast
description: TagsExplode fans out 3 single-color bundles into TagsDecorate.decoration. TagsDecorate runs once per element (1 bundle × 3 colors = 3) and emits a 3-element CUUN_TAGS list; TagsMerge runs per element (list broadcast) and PreviewAny collects all 3 prompts.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, red pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, green pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, blue pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: tag_decorate_two_lists_cross_product
description: TagsDecorate sets INPUT_IS_LIST=True and iterates bundle × decoration internally. 3 tops × 3 colors → 9 decorated bundles, each flattened via per-element TagsMerge and collected by PreviewAny (red shirt / blue shirt / green shirt / red blouse / ... / blue hoodie).
expect: red shirt
green shirt
blue shirt
red blouse
green blouse
blue blouse
red hoodie
green hoodie
blue hoodie

name: tag_decorate_chained_multiplies_axes
description: Two TagsDecorate nodes chained back-to-back. Stage 1 decorates clothing.bottoms with 3 colors (1×3 = 3). Stage 2 decorates clothing.tops with 2 patterns (3×2 = 6 total). Verifies the list output of stage 1 flows into the `bundle` of stage 2 and multiplies; per-element TagsMerge + PreviewAny renders all 6.
expect: plaid shirt, red pleated skirt
checkered shirt, red pleated skirt
plaid shirt, green pleated skirt
checkered shirt, green pleated skirt
plaid shirt, blue pleated skirt
checkered shirt, blue pleated skirt

name: tag_decorate_three_axis_chain
description: The full-stack sanity check. Base = CharacterPreset(serafuku_schoolgirl). Three TagsDecorate stages each pick a different target category and decoration source, multiplying to 3 × 2 × 2 = 12. Verifies (a) chained list propagation across three stages, (b) per-stage category targeting hits ALL tags belonging to that category (the clothing.uniform stage decorates BOTH serafuku and sailor_collar), (c) underscore-to-space replacement on multi-word decoration tags (polka_dot → polka dot), and (d) the full set of 12 outputs (rendered via per-element TagsMerge + PreviewAny) is exactly the Cartesian product in (skirt × top × legwear) iteration order.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, red pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, red pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, red pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, red pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, green pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, green pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, green pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, green pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers

name: tags_filter_drops_registry_category
description: TagsFilter targets clothing.legwear and drops the `thighhighs` tag from inside CharacterPreset(serafuku_schoolgirl)'s preset.X selection. Verifies registry-based per-tag filtering on a preset bundle; the survivors are flattened via TagsMerge and rendered by PreviewAny.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, loafers

name: tags_filter_chain_drops_multiple_categories
description: Two TagsFilter nodes in series drop two different registry categories (legwear, then footwear) from the same preset. Verifies the documented multi-category pattern (chain nodes rather than multi-select UI).
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt

name: tags_shuffle_deterministic
description: TagsShuffle reorders tags within each TaggedSelection deterministically per seed. CharacterPreset(miko) emits one selection of 8 tags; with seed=42 the shuffled order (flattened via TagsMerge, rendered by PreviewAny) must match Python's random.Random(42).shuffle reference output.
expect: miko, hakama, zouri, shrine_outdoors, bangs, tabi, long_hair, black_hair

name: bundle_inspector_kept_only
description: TagsBundleInspector renders a merged bundle grouped by layer/category into its `report` STRING. With no conflicts, the dropped section is omitted. PreviewAny shows the report.
expect:
[exposure]
  body.exposure : nude

name: bundle_inspector_with_dropped
description: TagsBundleInspector appends a `--- dropped ---` section to its `report` when TagsMerge.warnings carries conflict info. `nude` triggers TAG_CONFLICTS to drop the `shirt` tag from ClothingTops; PreviewAny shows the report.
expect:
[exposure]
  body.exposure : nude

--- dropped ---
conflict: dropped ['shirt'] from 'clothing.tops' (triggered by ['nude'])

name: text_concat_break_attribute_binding
description: Color/attribute binding pattern: each tag source's bundle goes through its own TagsMerge to produce a STRING, then TextConcat joins them with ' BREAK ' to isolate attention chunks. PreviewAny renders the concatenated result.
expect: shirt BREAK pleated_skirt BREAK plaid

name: text_concat_break_two_characters
description: Multi-character pattern: each CharacterPreset's bundle goes through its own TagsMerge → STRING, then TextConcat joins them with ' BREAK ', producing one BREAK-separated chunk per subject. PreviewAny renders the result.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors BREAK long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: text_concat_break_grouped_with_per_group_merge
description: Multi-source-per-group pattern: each BREAK group is pre-composed by its own TagsMerge (so mutex/conflicts resolve within the group), then the per-group prompt STRINGs are joined with TextConcat / ' BREAK '. PreviewAny renders the result.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors, smile, grin, happy, sparkling_eyes, open_mouth, :d, blush_stickers BREAK shrine, outdoors, afternoon, miko, hakama, looking_at_viewer, smile

name: aspect_ratio_preset_landscape
description: AspectRatioPreset emits (width, height) INTs. Verifies the node loads from the `nodes/image/` subpackage and resolves the named preset. Two PreviewAny terminators stringify each INT socket.

name: aspect_ratio_preset_swap_to_portrait
description: `swap=true` flips a landscape preset to portrait — verifies the swap toggle is reflected in the (width, height) INT outputs.

name: tags_random_pick_deterministic
description: TagsRandomPick describes a tag_pick spec (count/pool only — no seed lives on this node); TagsMerge (the pipeline's terminal build step) owns `seed`, XOR-mixing it with each unresolved spec's own bundle_i slot index before resolving. CharacterPreset(miko)'s 8 tags with count=3, merge seed=6 on bundle_1 (mixed to the same effective seed=7 as the prior random.Random(7).sample(...) reference) must reproduce that reference output, rendered by PreviewAny.
expect: tabi, black_hair, miko

name: pony_sdxl_pipeline_positive
description: Mirrors the positive text chain of example_workflows/pony_sdxl_pipeline.json — MetaPony prefix (scores + rating + source + extra) layered with character / personality / situation / quality presets through TagsMerge, rendered by PreviewAny.
expect: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up, rating_safe, source_anime, 1girl, solo, very_long_hair, purple_hair, witch, witch_hat, long_dress, thighhighs, boots, smug, grin, looking_at_viewer, hand_on_own_hip, determined, beach, ocean, outdoors, noon, sunny, swimsuit, wind_lift, looking_at_viewer, masterpiece, best_quality, very_aesthetic

name: pony_sdxl_pipeline_negative
description: Mirrors the negative text chain of example_workflows/pony_sdxl_pipeline.json — BadQuality (fidelity negatives) merged with BadGeneral (anatomy negatives), rendered by PreviewAny.
expect: worst_quality, low_quality, normal_quality, bad_quality, lowres, jpeg_artifacts, compression_artifacts, blurry, watermark, signature, username, artist_name, text, logo, error, chromatic_aberration, artistic_error, bad_anatomy, anatomical_nonsense, bad_proportions, bad_perspective, bad_reflection, bad_multiple_views, bad_shadow, bad_gun_anatomy, bad_vehicle_anatomy, bad_internal_anatomy

name: count_extract_from_merged_prompt
description: TagsExtractSubjectCount parses subject-count tags out of an assembled prompt. A count is injected via MetaCountGirls + MetaCountBoys, merged to a STRING, then extracted — verifying the STRING round-trips through TagsMerge into the parser. PreviewAny renders both the `count_tags` STRING and the `total` INT outputs.
expect: 2girls, 1boy

name: shared_seed_drives_random_pick
description: Seed emits one INT (with control-after-generate in the UI) wired into TagsMerge's `seed` — the only seed input left in the pipeline, since TagsRandomPick carries none of its own. Verifies the seed node loads from nodes/util/ and that its INT output drives the downstream unresolved spec deterministically (seed=7 XOR-mixed with the bundle_1 slot index over miko's 8 tags). PreviewAny renders the seed INT and the picked tags.
expect: black_hair, miko, bangs

name: combinator_collect_two_characters
description: Issue #23/#24: TagsCollect gathers two whole CharacterPreset bundles into one Combinator axis, and TagsCombinator emits a 2-element CUUN_TAGS list (one bundle per character, unmerged) instead of prompts. TagsMerge broadcasts over the list (merge delegated downstream) and PreviewAny collects both resolved prompts — one full blazer character, one full serafuku character, not a per-tag blow-up.
expect: medium_hair, brown_hair, blazer_uniform, blouse, pleated_skirt, cardigan, pantyhose, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: combinator_preset_override_axis
description: Issue #24: TagsCombinator over a preset base axis × an exploded HairColor axis emits concatenated CUUN_TAGS bundles; the downstream TagsMerge (broadcast per combination) resolves the hair MUTEX_GROUP last-wins, so the preset's brown_hair is overridden by each axis hair color. PreviewAny collects both prompts.
expect: long_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers, blue_hair
long_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers, red_hair

name: rules_to_json_build_from_rules_roundtrip
description: Issue #27: RulesToJson serializes a preset base axis x an exploded HairColor axis to a JSON `rules` STRING; BuildFromRules expands that STRING back into the same concatenated CUUN_TAGS combinations TagsCombinator would produce directly (same wiring as combinator_preset_override_axis, routed through JSON in between). TagsMerge resolves the hair MUTEX_GROUP last-wins and PreviewAny collects both prompts.
expect: long_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers, blue_hair
long_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers, red_hair

name: combinator_select_one_by_index
description: Memory-safe sweep: TagsSelect (INPUT_IS_LIST) picks ONE combination out of the TagsCombinator list by index, so the downstream pipeline is width 1 instead of fanning out all combinations. index=1 selects the second character; the picked label and the merged single prompt are surfaced via PreviewAny.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers
serafuku_schoolgirl

name: combinator_select_wraps_index
description: TagsSelect wraps index modulo the list length: over 2 combinations, index=3 wraps to 3 % 2 == 1, picking the second character (so queuing more runs than combinations keeps cycling the sweep).
expect: serafuku_schoolgirl

name: tags_random_bundle_deterministic
description: TagsRandomBundle describes a bundle_choice spec over the wired candidates (no seed on this node either); TagsMerge (the pipeline's terminal build step) resolves it by picking ONE whole bundle at random (categories/tags intact, no flattening), mixing its own `seed` with the bundle_1 slot index. With three CharacterPresets and merge seed=1 on bundle_1 (mixed to the same effective seed=0 as the prior random.Random(0).choice reference), it picks bundle_2 (blazer_schoolgirl); the chosen bundle is surfaced via PreviewAny.
expect: medium_hair, brown_hair, blazer_uniform, blouse, pleated_skirt, cardigan, pantyhose, loafers

name: tags_random_bundle_seed_selects_different_bundle
description: Same three-candidate TagsRandomBundle wiring as above; only TagsMerge's `seed` differs. merge seed=4 on bundle_1 (mixed to effective seed=5) selects bundle_3 (serafuku_schoolgirl) instead of bundle_2, confirming the whole-bundle choice is driven by TagsMerge's seed (and that each candidate is returned intact, not tag-sampled like TagsRandomPick).
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: metadata_save_extract_roundtrip
description: Full metadata round-trip in one graph: a built-in EmptyImage stands in for a dummy image, two chained MetadataSet nodes build a CUUN_METADATA bundle, SaveImageWithMetadata writes it to the output folder with those two custom PNG text chunks (embed_workflow off so the prompt chunk doesn't pollute the dump), and its `filenames` output feeds ExtractImageMetadata's `path` (the data dependency forces save-before-read). The extracted STRING — header + the two chunks, verbatim — is asserted via PreviewAny. Proves MetadataSet→Save→Extract works end-to-end on a real ComfyUI/PIL.
expect:
format: PNG
size: 64x64
mode: RGB
author: sters
seed: 42

name: metadata_save_load_roundtrip
description: Same EmptyImage→MetadataSet→Save round-trip, but the saved path feeds LoadImageWithMetadata's `path` and its `metadata` output (3rd socket) is asserted. Load doesn't add the format/size header, so the dump is just the two chunks. Confirms MetadataSet→Save→Load (image decode + metadata read) works end-to-end.
expect:
author: sters
seed: 42

name: metadata_get_value_by_key_roundtrip
description: Extends the save→extract round-trip with MetadataGetValue: the extracted dump feeds a key lookup for 'seed', so PreviewAny sees just '42' rather than the whole block. Proves you can pull a single value by key end-to-end.

name: metadata_get_value_missing_key_default
description: MetadataGetValue on a literal dump: a missing key falls back to `default`, confirming the lookup is exact-match and the default path works.
expect: fallback
